headline: Poland Vetoes Crypto Bill Ahead of MiCA Deadline

article.title: Polish president vetoes crypto bill for third time ahead of MiCA deadline
article.summary: Polish President Karol Nawrocki vetoed a bill to implement MiCA for the third time, just weeks before the end of the EU crypto framework's transitional period.

headline: US Stocks Gain 1% on Iran Tensions Ease
